titles.en: God Would Protect Whomever Has Four Characteristics
God Would Protect Whomever Has Four Characteristics

segments: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: أربع من كن فيه نشر الله عليه كنفه وأدخله الجنة في رحمته: حسن خلق يعيش به في الناس، ورفق بالمكروب وشفقة على الوالدين، وإحسان إلى المملوك
arabic.text: : قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: أربع من كن فيه نشر الله عليه كنفه وأدخله الجنة في رحمته: حسن خلق يعيش به في الناس، ورفق بالمكروب وشفقة على الوالدين، وإحسان إلى المملوك

segments: 4-57 Ahmad ibn Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim narrated that his father quoted his father, on the authority of his grandfather, on the authority of Abdullah ibn Maymun , on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq (MGB), on the authority of his father (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Whoever has four characteristics shall be protected by God and taken to Paradise: being good-tempered so as to live amongst the people; sympathizing with the ones who have suffered from calamities; being kind to their parents; and treating servants kindly.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 4-57 Ahmad ibn Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim narrated that his father quoted his father, on the authority of his grandfather, on the authority of Abdullah ibn Maymun , on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq (MGB), on the authority of his father (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Whoever has four characteristics shall be protected by God and taken to Paradise: being good-tempered so as to live amongst the people; sympathizing with the ones who have suffered from calamities; being kind to their parents; and treating servants kindly.”

narratorChain.raw: 4-57 حدثنا أحمد بن علي بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن جده، عن عبد الله بن ميمون، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه عليهما السلام قال

parts.text: أحمد بن علي بن إبراهيم بن هاشم،
